name: Advance America
description_short: Indianapolis, IN's Advance America at 5621 Georgetown Rd offers quick payday and title loans.
description_long:
Advance America is located at 5621 Georgetown Rd in Indianapolis, IN, operating as a standalone storefront dedicated to payday and title loans. The Indianapolis branch maintains convenient hours: Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 6 PM, and Saturday from 10 AM to 2 PM (closed Sundays). This Indianapolis location serves the area with fast-processing loan services for residents in need.

Services available at this Indianapolis storefront include payday loans, title loans, and cash advances tailored to your situation. For questions about eligibility, loan terms, or to discuss your specific financial needs, call 317-328-7894. The staff can walk through your options and help determine which product may work best for you.

Indianapolis residents seeking emergency cash can visit with a valid ID, proof of income, and banking information—many loans are approved and funded within hours. Advance America provides direct access to credit for Indianapolis families and individuals facing unexpected financial challenges.
pros: 4.9/5 average rating across 125,403+ verified customer reviews
Multiple loan products under one roof: payday, installment, and title loans
Same-day funding on personal loans up to $1,000
Title loans up to $25,000 through LoanCenter partnership
Accepts ITIN — accessible to borrowers without a Social Security Number
Bilingual staff (English and Spanish) at this location
Apply online, in-store, or pre-qualify by phone
cons: Payday loans max at $500 and carry the high APRs typical of 2-4 week short-term loans
Title loans require a fully paid-off vehicle with title in borrower's name — vehicle can be repossessed on default
Sunday hours: closed; Saturday closes at 4:00 pm — limited weekend access
No indication of APR ranges on the store page — borrowers must inquire directly
best_for: Consumers needing quick cash between paychecks with a clear repayment plan
Car owners with a clear title needing $2,000–$25,000 in emergency funds
Spanish-speaking borrowers seeking bilingual in-person loan assistance
Borrowers without a Social Security Number who have an ITIN
diagnosis: Advance America is best suited for consumers facing a short-term cash gap who have a checking account, verifiable income, and a firm plan to repay within weeks — or car owners needing larger emergency funds. The main caveat is that payday loans carry high effective APRs, making them expensive if rolled over; borrowers who can qualify elsewhere should compare total cost before committing.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.

meta_description: Advance America at 5621 Georgetown Rd, Indianapolis, IN. Fast payday and title loans. Mon-Fri 10-6, Sat 10-2.
